title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.01 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.01 Game Version 1.01 date July 24, 2023 Summary Rashid Release. Bug fixes with some minor balance changes mainly for Modern controls. Links Patch Notes Rashid Patch Rashid released Universal Changes Drive Rush Cancel Can now be performed with MP+MK (Classic) or Drive Parry button (Modern), only while holding Neutral or Forward Light normals are now cancelable into DRC even on whiff due to the low risk of these easier inputs Drive Parry Fixed issue where MK would come out if Parry was buffered during a screen freeze and then released before the Parry occurred Install Supers Fixed issue where unintended behavior would occur if hit by an attack on the exact frame the install timer expired Assist Combos (Modern) Fixed issue where Assist Combo inputs were not properly buffered, and where the 2nd attack of an Assist Combo would be performed even with only 1 input OD Special Moves (Modern) Fixed issue where some moves could not be manually input while holding the Assist button. Key Character Changes Blanka Charge Special Moves - Modern Controls (Rolling Attack, Aerial Rolling Attack, Vertical Rolling Attack) Fixed issue where charge time was unintentionally 10 frames longer and input was not recognized for the usual 10 frames after the Forward or Up input Charge Time: 50f → 40f; Input Recognition Time: 0f → 10f j.MP Fixed issue where special cancel could not be performed if the move was parried Back Throw (4LPLK) Fixed issue where Punish Counter built the same amount of Super gauge is a standard throw HP Aerial Rolling Attack (j.[4]6HP) Fixed issue where Blanka's recovery changed if the opponent blocked while in Burnout Cammy HK Cannon Strike (j.214HK) Fixed issue where j.HK would come out instead if input at earliest timing OD Quick Spin Knuckle (214PP) Fixed issue where opponent's attack could come out in the wrong direction if input during the side switch Chun-Li Charge Special Moves - Modern Controls (Kikoken) Fixed issue where meterless version charge time was unintentionally 5 frames shorter; Charge Time: 45f → 50f Fixed issue where input was not recognized for the usual 10 frames after the Forward input (all versions); Input Recognition Time: 0f → 10f Forward/Back/Air Throw (LPLK/4LPLK/j.LPLK) Fixed issue where Charge timing would be reset during the successful throw animations Serenity Stream (214P) Fixed issue where canceling attacks into 214P~K would result in Hazanshu (214K) Dee Jay Face Breaker (4HK) Fixed issue where Punish Counter Drive Damage was higher vs. airborne opponents Back Throw (4LPLK) Fixed issue where Punish Counter built the same amount of Super gauge is a standard throw Dhalsim Agile Kick (1LK) Chain cancel version no longer works with 2LK input (Classic controls only; no change to Modern) OD Yoga Arch (236KK) Fixed issue where the projectile would reappear after the SA3/CA cinematic OD Yoga Comet (j.63214PP) Fixed issue where Dhalsim could no longer perform mid-air moves when parried by the opponent E. Honda 2LP Fixed issue where the chained version could be kara-canceled on startup SA3/CA (214214P) Fixed issue where E. Honda would gain much more Drive gauge when parried than other characters Jamie Modern 2L Changed from 2LK → 2LP so that he has access to a 4-frame attack Juri 1-Stock Enhanced Saihasho / Ankensatsu / Go Ohatsu (236LK/236MK/236HK) Fixed issue where the 1st frame could be kara-canceled into SA3/CA (allowing unintended combo routes with 2 stocks) Kimberly SA3/CA (236233P) Fixed issue where it could hit cross-up (behind Kimberly) Lily OD Condor Dive (j.PPP) Fixed issue where Lily could perform this from a back jump by plinking the inputs (j.PP~P) Air SA2 (j.236236K) Fixed issue where Lily could not perform this from a back jump if the inputs where plinked Fixed issue where the opponent would not be KO'd if the 2nd hit connected mid-air Marisa Scutum (Modern 6S) Fixed issue where after a counter-attack, a Down input would cause Marisa to exit the stance even while holding the S button, making it difficult to perform Enfold (6S~2S) Ryu Drive Impact Fixed issue where extra combo scaling would sometimes be applied, resulting in lower damage Zangief Fixed issue where Drive gauge recovery during Burnout was slower than other characters SA1 (236236K) Fixed bug where Zangief was considered airborne during the successful throw animation, resulting in less Drive gauge build than usual

items.text: Rashid released
items.html: Rashid released

lists.text: Drive Rush Cancel Can now be performed with MP+MK (Classic) or Drive Parry button (Modern), only while holding Neutral or Forward Light normals are now cancelable into DRC even on whiff due to the low risk of these easier inputs Drive Parry Fixed issue where MK would come out if Parry was buffered during a screen freeze and then released before the Parry occurred Install Supers Fixed issue where unintended behavior would occur if hit by an attack on the exact frame the install timer expired Assist Combos (Modern) Fixed issue where Assist Combo inputs were not properly buffered, and where the 2nd attack of an Assist Combo would be performed even with only 1 input OD Special Moves (Modern) Fixed issue where some moves could not be manually input while holding the Assist button.

items.text: Drive Rush Cancel Can now be performed with MP+MK (Classic) or Drive Parry button (Modern), only while holding Neutral or Forward Light normals are now cancelable into DRC even on whiff due to the low risk of these easier inputs
items.html:
Drive Rush Cancel
  • Can now be performed with MP+MK (Classic) or Drive Parry button (Modern), only while holding Neutral or Forward
  • Light normals are now cancelable into DRC even on whiff due to the low risk of these easier inputs

items.text: Drive Parry Fixed issue where MK would come out if Parry was buffered during a screen freeze and then released before the Parry occurred
items.html:
Drive Parry
  • Fixed issue where MK would come out if Parry was buffered during a screen freeze and then released before the Parry occurred

items.text: Install Supers Fixed issue where unintended behavior would occur if hit by an attack on the exact frame the install timer expired
items.html:
Install Supers
  • Fixed issue where unintended behavior would occur if hit by an attack on the exact frame the install timer expired

items.text: Assist Combos (Modern) Fixed issue where Assist Combo inputs were not properly buffered, and where the 2nd attack of an Assist Combo would be performed even with only 1 input
items.html:

  • Fixed issue where Assist Combo inputs were not properly buffered, and where the 2nd attack of an Assist Combo would be performed even with only 1 input

  • Fixed issue where some moves could not be manually input while holding the Assist button.

items.html:
Charge Special Moves - Modern Controls (Rolling Attack, Aerial Rolling Attack, Vertical Rolling Attack)
  • Fixed issue where charge time was unintentionally 10 frames longer and input was not recognized for the usual 10 frames after the Forward or Up input
  • Charge Time: 50f → 40f; Input Recognition Time: 0f → 10f
